current_suggestion.pitch: Your current roster is heavy on domain experts but light on rigorous epistemology — how to actually evaluate conflicting evidence, update beliefs, and reason under uncertainty. Rational Animations covers decision theory, philosophy of mind, forecasting, and effective reasoning using animated essays in the style of 3Blue1Brown applied to ideas rather than math. The depth is genuine — episodes engage seriously with Kahneman, Parfit, and LessWrong-style thinking without being cultish about it — and it complements your interest in mental models and Stoic philosophy by stress-testing the frameworks themselves.
